runTitle: Server-Timing hosting-path diagnosis and QA policy update

expertAssessments.rationale: 같은 /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 요청을 production과 localhost에서 직접 fetch 비교해 timing header 전달 경로를 분리 검증했습니다.
localhost:3000에서는 Server-Timing과 performance.serverTiming이 모두 보였고, production에서는 X-AI-* 헤더는 유지되지만 Server-Timing만 비었습니다. 앱 코드가 아니라 Vercel production 응답 경로 차이로 판단되며, QA SSOT를 X-AI-Latency-Ms로 정리했습니다.

completedImprovements.title: Server-Timing production/local hosting path difference diagnosed
completedImprovements.evidence: localhost:3000 stream/v2 returned Server-Timing=ai;dur=302 and performance.serverTiming[ai=302], while production stream/v2 returned serverTiming=null with X-AI-Latency-Ms still present

completedImprovements.title: QA timing header SSOT standardized to X-AI-Latency-Ms
completedImprovements.evidence: reports/qa/README.md updated: X-AI-Latency-Ms and X-AI-Processing-Ms are production QA SSOT, Server-Timing is best-effort only

notes: Production direct fetch: /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 status=200, x-ai-latency-ms=237, x-ai-mode=streaming, x-ai-source=cloud-run, x-ai-cache-status=BYPASS, server-timing=null.
Production performance entry: serverTiming=[] for the same request.
Local direct fetch: /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 status=200, Server-Timing=ai;dur=302, X-AI-Latency-Ms=302.
Local performance entry: serverTiming contains metric ai dur=302.
QA policy updated so production timing assertions rely on X-AI-Latency-Ms / X-AI-Processing-Ms as SSOT.
